headline: Certification Upgrade at Microchip's French Facility: Upside Ahead?
summary: MCHP's Nantes facility adds QM, Class Y certification, expanding advanced packaging capabilities for aerospace and defense semiconductors.

headline: Hexcel Gains From Strong Aerospace Demand & Defense Exposure
summary: HXL rides commercial aerospace recovery and defense demand, but supply-chain disruptions and labor shortages may weigh on near-term performance.
